When is Halloween?

Halloween is always October 31. The countdown above updates automatically and counts down to midnight on October 31 of the current or next year.

Halloween traditions

Halloween originated from the ancient Celtic festival of Samhain. Today it is celebrated in many countries with costumes, trick-or-treating, and jack-o-lanterns. It is especially popular in the USA, Canada, Ireland, and the UK.

Frequently asked questions

How many days until Halloween 2026?

The countdown above shows the exact number of days until October 31, 2026. It updates automatically every time you open the page.

What day is Halloween 2026?

Halloween 2026 (October 31, 2026) is a Saturday.

How many weeks until Halloween?

Divide the days remaining by 7 to get the approximate weeks. The live counter shows the precise breakdown.

What time does Halloween start?

Halloween is all day on October 31. Trick-or-treating typically happens in the evening, starting around 6 PM.
